subject: [PATCH v5 5/6] fuse: add zero-copy over io-uring

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds zero-copy support to the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) io-uring implementation, allowing for direct access to client pages or page cache folios without intermediate memory copies. This is achieved by registering relevant pages into a sparse slot in the server's io_uring registered buffer table and using fixed buffer operations. The patch requires CAP_SYS_ADMIN capability and bufpools, and introduces a new flag FOPEN_IO_URING_ZERO_COPY for servers to specify which open files should use zero-copy. The request flow is modified to skip data copying when possible, reducing memory overhead and improving performance.
